stemHtml: One of the possible disturbances of the ILS signal is "scalloping". Which statement is correct?

options.a: Scalloping are minor changes or bends which can be followed by the aircraft.
options.b: Scalloping causes rapid indicator changes from side to side of the intended approach path which cannot be followed by the aircraft.
options.c: Scalloping are rapid changes or bends which can be followed by the aircraft.
options.d: Scalloping are major changes or bends in the approach path which cannot be followed by the aircraft.
